data.title: Squirrel Media Sees Total Investment Of 53 MLn Euro In Audiovisual Content In 2025-2026
data.description:
Squirrel Media SA :

  • SEES TOTAL INVESTMENT OF 53 MILLION EURO IN AUDIOVISUAL CONTENT IN 2025-2026 PERIOD

  • SQUIRREL MEDIA SEES CONSOLIDATED REVENUES BETWEEN 250 - 270 MILLION EUROS FOR 2025, BETWEEN 320 - 350 MILLION EUROS FOR 2026

  • SEES CONSOLIDATED EBITDA BETWEEN 36 AND 40 MILLION EUROS IN 2025, AND BETWEEN 48 AND 52 MILLION EUROS IN 2026

  • SEES CONSOLIDATED EBITDA MARGIN BETWEEN 13.3% AND 16.0% IN 2025 AND BETWEEN 13.7% AND 16.2% IN 2026

data.title: Primary Health Properties makes $1.96 billion cash-and-share bid for Assura
data.description:
Assura <AGRP.L> said on Thursday that Primary Health Properties has made an indicative cash-and-share acquisition proposal, valuing the British healthcare real estate investment trust at 1.5 billion pounds ($1.96 billion).

($1 = 0.7639 pounds)

data.title: REG - Diploma PLC - Director Declaration
data.description:
RNS Number : 5069D Diploma PLC 03 April 2025  

   10-11 CHARTERHOUSE SQUARE, LONDON EC1M 6EE

TELEPHONE: +44 (0)20 7549 5700

FACSIMILE: +44 (0)20 7549 5715

3 April 2025

DIPLOMA PLC

DIRECTOR DECLARATION - EXTERNAL APPOINTMENT

Diploma PLC, the international value-add distribution group, has been notified that Katie Bickerstaffe, Senior Independent Director, will be appointed to the Board, and the Corporate Responsibility and Sustainability Committee and the Nomination and Governance Committee, of J Sainsbury plc as a Non-Executive Director with effect from 3 July 2025.

This announcement is made pursuant to LR 6.4.9 of the Listing Rules.

J Morrison

Group General Counsel & Company Secretary

Diploma PLC

data.title: Novo Nordisk: Thilde Hummel Bogebjerg Promoted to Head Quality, IT & Environmental Affairs
Novo Nordisk: Ludovic Helfgott to Assume Responsibility for Pdt & Portfolio Strategy, Including Comml Strategy, Medical Affairs and Business Devt
Fire put out at PBF Martinez, California refinery, CCH said
data.description:
The Contra Costa Health Services (CCH) said a fire that broke at PBF Energy's 156,400 barrel-per-day (bpd) Martinez, California refinery on Wednesday evening has been put out.

"The refinery reports that someone was injured in the fire," CCH said in a post on social media platform X, adding that it has asked the refinery to submit a 72-hour report.

PBF Energy did not immediately reply to a Reuters request for comment.

data.title: REG - Trustpilot Group PLC - Transaction in Own Shares
data.description:
RNS Number : 4215D Trustpilot Group PLC 03 April 2025  

3 April 2025

Trustpilot Group plc

Transaction in own shares

Trustpilot Group plc ("Trustpilot" or the "Company") announces that on 2 April 2025, it purchased the following number of its ordinary shares of £0.01 each (the "Ordinary Shares") on the London Stock Exchange from Joh. Berenberg, Gossler & Co. KG, London Branch ("Berenberg"), in accordance with the terms of the share buyback programme announced on 18 March 2025 (the "Buyback Programme").

Date of purchase:

2 April 2025

Aggregate number of Ordinary Shares purchased:

50,000

Lowest price paid per share (GBp):

219.00

Highest price paid per share (GBp):

223.60

Volume weighted average price paid per share (GBp):

220.82

Trustpilot intends to cancel all of the purchased shares.

Since 18 March 2025, the Company has purchased 2,073,144 Ordinary Shares for cancellation, at a cost (excluding dealing and associated costs) of ~£4,933,200.

In accordance with Article 5(1)(b) of Regulation (EU) No 596/2014 (as incorporated into UK domestic law by the European Union (Withdrawal) Act 2018), a schedule of individual trades made by Berenberg is available using the following link:

http://www.rns-pdf.londonstockexchange.com/rns/4215D_1-2025-4-2.pdf

data.description:
RNS Number : 4308D JPMorgan American IT PLC 03 April 2025  

LONDON STOCK EXCHANGE ANNOUNCEMENT

JPMORGAN AMERICAN INVESTMENT TRUST PLC

DIVIDEND DECLARATION

Legal Entity Identifier: 549300QNAI4XRPEB4G65

Information disclosed in accordance with DTR 6.1.13

The Board of JPMorgan American Investment Trust plc announces that, subject to shareholder approval at the Annual General Meeting to be held on 14th May 2025, a dividend of 8.25p will be paid on 30th May 2025 to shareholders on the register at the close of business on 22nd April 2025. The ex-dividend date will be 17th April 2025.

A dividend reinvestment plan is available for shareholders and the last election date is 8th May 2025.

data.title: Novo Nordisk: Tania Sabroe, Head of People & Organisation, Will Also Head Global Communication
Momentum Group publishes Annual and Sustainability Report 2024
data.description:
Momentum Group’s Annual and Sustainability Report 2024 has been published and is now available on the Group’s website.

– Momentum Group continued to deliver a strong performance in 2024, despite challenging market conditions. Our decentralised business model, our focus on profitability and our ability to combine organic growth with value-adding acquisitions enabled us to once again surpass all of our financial targets. This points to the strength of our business, where our independent companies can adjust or accelerate based on their specific situations, which creates conditions that allow us to develop our operations at the Group level with profitability and earnings growth, says Ulf Lilius, President and CEO, in the President's statement.

The Annual and Sustainability Report for 2024 is attached to this press release and can be downloaded at momentum.group.

data.title: Anhui Tianda takes No.2 PP unit off stream

data.title: Tallink Grupp Sees A 21% Decrease In Passengers In March Versus Year Ago
data.description:
Tallink Grupp AS :

  • SEES A 21% DECREASE IN PASSENGERS IN MARCH YOY

  • CARGO UNITS DOWN 30.1% IN MARCH

  • PASSENGER VEHICLES NUMBER DROPS BY 11.9% YOY

data.title: Russia Composite PMI Lowest in Over 2 Years
data.description:
The S&P Global Russia Composite PMI fell to 49.1 in March 2025 from 50.4 in the previous month, pointing to the lowest reading since December 2022.

It was also the first contraction in private sector activity in six months.

data.title: Yunnan Tourism to Issue Shares
data.description:
Yunnan Tourism plans to issue shares to certain investments, according to a Shenzhen Stock Exchagne filing on Thursday.

The Chinese tourism company confirms there is no provision of financial assistance or compensation to investors participating in the subscription, the filing said.

The company's shares rose less than 2% in recent trade.

data.title: Photon Energy Secures Polish Capacity Market Contracts For 139 MW For EUR 12.5 Mln For 2026
data.description:
Photon Energy NV :

  • SECURES POLISH CAPACITY MARKET CONTRACTS FOR 139 MW FOR EUR 12.5 MILLION FOR 2026
